[2019-10-24 18:35] hyreon: Pair Drone ( :Blue: :Drone: :Drone: , 10 supply) 2 :Health: 
:Prompt: Prompt Blocker
On start of turn: Gain 1 :Gold:
:Click: : Gain 1 :Gold:
Unlike most drone upgrades, this does not upgrade your economy at all, but it also doesn't cost any gold. It's designed to shrug off threat as it is half-vigilant, and provide some sort of blue sink to support things like Apollo and Odin.
Also, by being prompt, it can defend *and* produce economy at 100% efficiency its first turn.
I do not imagine it would have high impact most games, despite all this.
[2019-10-24 18:44] vargus2254870 (Vargus225): It's also a Forcefield, but it is not efficient that way either
